contentBlocks.original:
आकाशात् पतितं तोयं यथागच्छति सागरम् ।
सर्वदेव नमस्कारः केशवं प्रतिगच्छति ॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
ākāśāt patitaṃ toyaṃ yathāgacchati sāgaram .
sarvadeva namaskāraḥ keśavaṃ pratigacchati ..
contentBlocks.translation: Just as water fallen from the sky goes to the ocean, so too all salutations to the gods reach Keshava (Krishna/Vishnu).
contentBlocks.meanings: आकाशात् (ākāśāt) – from the sky; पतितं (patitaṃ) – fallen; तोयं (toyaṃ) – water; यथा (yathā) – just as; अगच्छति (agacchati) – goes; सागरम् (sāgaram) – to the ocean; सर्वदेव (sarvadeva) – all gods (sarva:all | deva:gods); नमस्कारः (namaskāraḥ) – salutations; केशवं (keśavaṃ) – to Keshava; प्रतिगच्छति (pratigacchati) – reach;
